text: “Two-directional highway” means an undivided highway upon which vehicles are allowed to proceed in opposite directions.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.073 — “Two-directional highway” defined.

“Two-directional highway” means an undivided highway upon which vehicles are allowed to proceed in opposite directions.

subsections.text: “Two-directional highway” means an undivided highway upon which vehicles are allowed to proceed in opposite directions.
